original_title: MIDE-385 I was playd by your boss today. JULIA - Julia
overview: Mr. Oki, a junior of my husband, was promoted to become a director. A junior who has been taking care of him since he was a newcomer becomes his boss. I found that my husband had a higher pride than anyone else and was quite shocked. Husband who becomes emotionally unstable, boss who often rushes home and demands sexual entertainment from me. I knew everything was being manipulated by him, but I couldn't help it anymore ...
